creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: I'm having trouble finding anyone who packages it "normally"; Ubuntu has a snap for it though. The snap of 1.8.0 shows the same magnifying glass and percentage and no meaningful interaction. The menus also don't provide a zoom or other functionality: I'm going to close this as "ask upstream" (best I can choose is "not accepted" which sounds less friendly than I intend), but most likely is that it's just not finished functionality, or means something unintuitive to you and me.
